summary: A social media followers website called 'Crown Followers' with a pricing model of ₹5/500 views. The project has been deployed multiple times (Version 4) and the user has requested a name change to 'Crown Followers'.
architectural_notes: Project is a social media followers/views service platform
known_issues: Draft keeps expiring before user can review; users get confused between draft and production versions

existing_features.title: Update the website name to 'Crown Followers' in the browser tab title (index.html <title> tag) and in all places it currently appears on the page, including the Header logo/brand text and Footer brand name.

new_feature_requests.summary: Change website name to 'Crown Followers' in browser title and all page appearances
